title: deyeuxia arundinacea var. ciliata
intro: Deyeuxia arundinacea var. ciliata, also known as the Ciliate Deyeuxia or Slender Deyeuxia, is a type of grass native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Deyeuxia arundinacea var. ciliata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, where it is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
